---
title: Coding Tutorials
---

# Welcome - Let's code!

## Introduction

These are reproducible walkthroughs written entirely in Quarto (.qmd) files.

**Things to keep in mind:**

-   When available, I link to publicly available datasets, literature, and workflows.
-   Please start with a small subset of samples while learning. It's easier before scaling up.
-   Each tutorial includes a subsection showing required packages and versions used.
-   My writing style is intentionally short, choppy, to the point. *Lo siento!*
-   Know your computer (CPU, MEM). Some lines of code will "exercise the beast", hehe

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## **Amplicons**

[Qiime2 - ASVs](qiime/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .me-2} \* BASH, Python

[WGCNA](wgcna/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .me-2} \* R

[Spiec-Easi](spiec/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .me-2} \* R

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## **MetaTranscripts**

[Short-Read: HMMER, PPLACER](pplacer/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .me-2} \* BASH, Python, R

[Long-Read: HMMER](hmmer/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .me-2} \* BASH, Python, R

[DB Taxonomy Annotation](dbAnno/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .me-2} \* BASH, R

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## **Metabolites**

[Targeted BMIS](bmis/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .me-2} \* R

[RF Normalization](rfNorm/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .me-2} \* R

[Untargeted SulfurHunter](sHunter/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .me-2} \* R
